name: GitHub repositories should not allow force pushes on protected branches
description: Repositories where force pushes are allowed on the default protected branch
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where Cyscale observed force pushes allowed on the default branch protection rule.

### Assessment context

Force pushes can rewrite reviewed history and weaken auditability of changes to protected source branches.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Disable force pushes in the default branch protection rule or repository ruleset. Limit bypass permissions to narrowly scoped administrators or automation accounts.
